Home / Shop / Accessories

Accessories

Lock box and stick rack – secure valuables and keep sticks organized.

Lock Box with Digital Key Lock

+ $80.00

Secure lock box with a digital key lock for phones, wallets, and other valuables inside each locker.

Request a quote

Stick Rack

Starting at $299

Dedicated stick storage that keeps sticks organized, off the floor, and easy to grab on the way to the ice.

Request a quote

Cushions, coat rods, hooks, name plates, skate hooks, and custom logos are available as add-ons to our lockers.

View all locker options

PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" & 30" widths) or custom-built in three months. 50% deposit to begin. 30+ years of craftsmanship.

2934 200 Street, Langley, BC V2Z 2C1 Canada

sales@playerstall.com

1 888 584 1444

our services

  • Full locker room solutions
  • Quick ship lockers
  • View our gallery

@playerstall

QUICK CONTACT INFO

Premium wood lockers at unbeatable prices. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks or custom in 8–12 weeks. We'll match any USA competitor's price. Call for a free quote.

b Monday-Friday: 9am to 5pm;
Saturday: 10am to 2pm

z 2934 200 Street, Langley, BC V2Z 2C1 Canada

m 1 888 584 1444
